role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Loblolly/Longleaf pine) and forest structure.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, shoulder width, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera generation artifacts and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the specific pine species and road markings. The meta agent's identification of the camera artifact was a decisive factor.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of pine/deciduous mix and terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification aligns with the visual evidence of the trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings (yellow/white lines) and shoulder width are correctly described.
